chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 206 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 01-10-2025 Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation is received. This Petition was filed in the year, 2018 and it was lastly fixed in Court on 31-08-2022 and on the said date it was surfaced that Mr. Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Soomro, Counsel for the Petitioners has been appointed as Special Prosecutor NAB, therefore, direct notices were issued to the Petitioners. Record reflects that despite direct notices the Petitioners did not appear nor have engaged any Counsel to pursue the matter diligently. The matter is pending without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioners prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
